fa-industry-alt.appearanceId: a factory or industrial building silhouette with a large rectangular structure, one or more tall chimney stacks, and a small gear or alternate architectural detail distinguishing it from the standard factory; industrial plant outline with smokestacks and a variant roofline or gear element
fa-industry-alt.functionalityId: represents an advanced or alternative industrial facility or manufacturing operation; marks a category as specialized industrial or production-related
fa-industry-alt.intentId: identify or locate a specialized industrial facility; access advanced manufacturing or industrial sector content in a business app

fa-infinity.appearanceId: a continuous double-looped horizontal figure-eight curve with no endpoints, forming a symmetrical lemniscate shape; two equal oval loops joined at the center crossover point in a flat horizontal orientation
fa-infinity.functionalityId: represents an unlimited, endless, or infinite quantity or duration; indicates a looping, continuous, or unlimited feature in a system
fa-infinity.intentId: indicate unlimited capacity or an infinite loop; convey a continuous or boundless attribute in an app or setting

fa-info.appearanceId: a lowercase letter i with a dot above and a slightly thicker vertical stroke below on a plain background; minimalist information letterform with a round tittle and a short vertical stem
fa-info.functionalityId: opens a tooltip, help overlay, or informational details panel; displays supplementary information about an item
fa-info.intentId: learn more about a feature or item; access help or descriptive details for a selected element

fa-info-square.appearanceId: a square or rounded-square border containing a lowercase letter i centered within it; box outline with a dotted-i information letterform inside
fa-info-square.functionalityId: opens an information panel or help details within a framed button; displays supplementary data for a boxed item or section
fa-info-square.intentId: access additional information about a feature or item in a framed context; view help or descriptive details in a button or badge

fa-inhaler.appearanceId: a metered-dose inhaler device shape with a cylindrical canister inserted into an L-shaped mouthpiece and actuator body; medical aerosol device silhouette with a vertical cartridge and a horizontal nozzle housing
fa-inhaler.functionalityId: represents asthma medication, respiratory treatment, or inhaler use; marks a medication reminder or pulmonary care action
fa-inhaler.intentId: log or manage inhaler medication usage; access asthma or respiratory treatment tracking in a health app

fa-input-numeric.appearanceId: a rectangular text-input field box outline containing a numeral or digit character inside; flat input field shape with a number symbol displayed as the field content
fa-input-numeric.functionalityId: activates or inserts a numeric input field in a form or interface; restricts a text field to accept only numbers
fa-input-numeric.intentId: add or interact with a number-only input field; configure a form element to accept numeric values

fa-input-pipe.appearanceId: a rectangular text-input field box outline containing a single vertical pipe or bar cursor character inside; flat input field shape with a narrow vertical line as the blinking cursor indicator
fa-input-pipe.functionalityId: activates or places a text cursor into an input field; represents an active or focused empty text entry box
fa-input-pipe.intentId: focus on an empty text input field; indicate a ready-to-type cursor position in a form element

fa-input-text.appearanceId: a rectangular text-input field box outline containing a short sequence of text characters or a lowercase letter string inside; flat input field shape with a small text snippet displayed as sample field content
fa-input-text.functionalityId: activates or inserts a text input field in a form or interface; represents a general-purpose text entry element
fa-input-text.intentId: add or interact with a text input field in a form; configure a form element to accept alphanumeric text

fa-inr.appearanceId: the Indian rupee currency symbol consisting of two horizontal parallel bars at the top above a vertical stroke with a diagonal leg forming a stylized capital R with a strikethrough bar; currency glyph with dual crossbars over a letterform descending diagonally
fa-inr.functionalityId: displays or selects the Indian rupee as the currency denomination; represents a monetary value denominated in INR
fa-inr.intentId: work with Indian rupee pricing or currency conversion; display or set an INR monetary value in a financial context

fa-integral.appearanceId: a tall elongated S-shaped or sigmoid curve glyph used as the mathematical integral symbol; a vertically stretched sinuous stroke with a subtle top curve and bottom curve representing a calculus integration operator
fa-integral.functionalityId: inserts or represents an integral operator in a mathematical or scientific expression; denotes an integration calculation in a formula editor
fa-integral.intentId: write or display a mathematical integral expression; access calculus or scientific notation tools in a math editor

fa-interrobang.appearanceId: a combined exclamation mark and question mark overlaid or merged into a single glyph with both a dot at the base and a curved query hook fused with a straight exclamation stroke; dual punctuation mark combining a question curve and an exclamation bar in one symbol
fa-interrobang.functionalityId: inserts an interrobang punctuation character combining surprise and inquiry; represents a rhetorical exclamatory question in text
fa-interrobang.intentId: insert an interrobang mark to express simultaneous surprise and inquiry; use a combined question-exclamation punctuation in a document

fa-intersection.appearanceId: two overlapping circle or ellipse outlines with a shaded or highlighted lens-shaped overlap region in the center; two ring shapes crossing to form a central vesica or almond-shaped intersection area
fa-intersection.functionalityId: represents a set intersection operation or logical AND relationship between two groups; indicates overlapping data or shared attributes between two sets
fa-intersection.intentId: find or display common elements between two data sets; apply a set intersection or logical overlap filter in a query

fa-island-tropical.appearanceId: a small rounded landmass or mound shape with a tall palm tree silhouette rising from it and a sun in the upper corner; tropical island outline with a coconut palm and a circular sun above
fa-island-tropical.functionalityId: represents a tropical destination, vacation, or island getaway location; marks a travel or leisure category with a beach theme
fa-island-tropical.intentId: find or bookmark a tropical vacation destination; browse beach or island travel options in a travel app

fa-italic.appearanceId: a single slanted or oblique letter i or a rightward-leaning italic letterform glyph; forward-angled text character representing typographic italic style
fa-italic.functionalityId: applies italic formatting to selected text in a document editor; toggles the italic style on a text selection
fa-italic.intentId: format selected text in italic style; apply an oblique or slanted typographic emphasis to words

fa-j.appearanceId: a single uppercase or lowercase letter J with a curved descending hook at the bottom; vertical stroke glyph with a rightward-curving tail at the base representing the tenth letter of the alphabet
fa-j.functionalityId: represents the letter J as a label, initial, or category marker; marks an item or section starting with the letter J
fa-j.intentId: label or categorize content starting with J; use the letter J as a shorthand or identifier

fa-jack-o-lantern.appearanceId: a round pumpkin silhouette with a carved face featuring triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a jagged toothed mouth, with a small stem at the top; carved Halloween pumpkin outline with geometric facial cutouts and a short stem
fa-jack-o-lantern.functionalityId: marks a Halloween event, seasonal decoration, or autumn holiday category; represents a spooky or festive fall theme
fa-jack-o-lantern.intentId: browse Halloween or autumn seasonal content; decorate or theme an app or event with a jack-o-lantern motif

fa-jar.appearanceId: a tall cylindrical glass jar or mason jar shape with a flat lid on top, a rounded body, and a flat base; food storage container silhouette with a sealed screw-on cap and straight sides
fa-jar.functionalityId: represents food storage, canning, or a container for preserved goods; marks a pantry or kitchen storage category
fa-jar.intentId: manage food storage or pantry inventory; access canning or food preservation content in a recipe or kitchen app

fa-jar-wheat.appearanceId: a cylindrical jar or mason jar shape with a flat lid and a wheat or grain stalk illustration on the body or emerging from the top; food jar silhouette with a cereal grain or wheat sprig element
fa-jar-wheat.functionalityId: represents grain storage, wheat-based food products, or a harvest pantry item; marks a whole-grain or natural food storage category
fa-jar-wheat.intentId: manage grain or wheat food storage; browse whole-grain or harvest food products in a pantry or recipe app

fa-jedi.appearanceId: a stylized Jedi Order insignia with a central blade or crest shape flanked by symmetrical wing-like curved elements; pointed central emblem with arcing side wings forming a heraldic crest or badge
fa-jedi.functionalityId: marks a Star Wars Jedi Order theme or fan category; represents a Jedi or sci-fi fantasy affiliation badge
fa-jedi.intentId: access Jedi Order or Star Wars themed content; indicate a Jedi affiliation or sci-fi franchise category

fa-jet-fighter-up.appearanceId: a jet fighter aircraft silhouette oriented vertically with the nose pointing upward, delta wings swept back, and a tail fin at the bottom; military aircraft outline with a vertical climb orientation and swept-wing profile
fa-jet-fighter-up.functionalityId: represents a vertical climb, launch, or rapid ascent action; marks military aviation or aerospace content
fa-jet-fighter-up.intentId: indicate a rapid launch or vertical climb operation; access military aviation or aerospace content in an app

fa-joint.appearanceId: a hand-rolled cigarette or conical joint shape with a twisted or tapered end, slightly curved along its length; rolled paper cylinder silhouette with a pointed tip and a slight taper representing a cannabis cigarette
fa-joint.functionalityId: represents cannabis consumption or a marijuana roll; marks a dispensary or cannabis product category
fa-joint.intentId: access cannabis product information or dispensary content; indicate a marijuana-related category in a relevant app

fa-journal-whills.appearanceId: a book or journal silhouette with a stylized Jedi or Star Wars crest emblem on the cover; rectangular tome outline with a pointed-wing heraldic emblem centered on the front face
fa-journal-whills.functionalityId: represents a Star Wars lore journal or canonical story reference; marks a Jedi scripture or sci-fi franchise book category
fa-journal-whills.intentId: access Star Wars lore or Jedi scripture content; browse canonical reference material in a sci-fi franchise app

fa-joystick.appearanceId: an arcade joystick silhouette with a vertical stick shaft topped by a round ball grip mounted on a rectangular base platform; upright control stick outline with a spherical handle and a flat mounting base
fa-joystick.functionalityId: represents a gaming control input or arcade game action; navigates or controls movement in a game interface
fa-joystick.intentId: play or control a game using a joystick interface; access arcade or retro gaming content in an entertainment app

fa-jug.appearanceId: a wide-mouthed pitcher or jug silhouette with a curved spout at the top, a single loop handle on the side, and a rounded body narrowing to a flat base; ceramic or glass liquid vessel outline with a handle and a pour spout
fa-jug.functionalityId: represents a liquid container, pitcher, or pouring vessel; marks a beverage serving or kitchen utensil category
fa-jug.intentId: browse kitchen or beverage serving equipment; indicate a liquid pouring or storage vessel in a recipe or kitchen app

fa-jug-bottle.appearanceId: a jug or handle-equipped bottle shape with a narrow neck, a looped carrying handle at the top, and a rounded lower body; large-format handle bottle silhouette combining a loop grip with a bottle form
fa-jug-bottle.functionalityId: represents a large-format handle bottle or gallon jug for liquids; marks a bulk liquid container or beverage storage category
fa-jug-bottle.intentId: browse bulk liquid containers or large beverage bottles; manage large-format liquid storage in a pantry or shopping app

fa-jug-detergent.appearanceId: a detergent or laundry jug silhouette with a handle, a flip-top or screw cap, and a rounded body typical of cleaning product packaging; cleaning product container outline with a grip handle and a dispensing cap
fa-jug-detergent.functionalityId: represents a laundry detergent or household cleaning product; marks a cleaning supply or laundry care category
fa-jug-detergent.intentId: manage or shop for laundry detergent or cleaning supplies; track household cleaning product inventory

fa-k.appearanceId: a single uppercase or lowercase letter K with two diagonal strokes meeting a vertical stem at a midpoint; angular letterform with an upper and lower diagonal arm extending from a straight left stroke
fa-k.functionalityId: represents the letter K as a label, initial, or category marker; marks an item or section starting with the letter K
fa-k.intentId: label or categorize content starting with K; use the letter K as a shorthand or identifier

fa-kaaba.appearanceId: a cubic or box-shaped building silhouette draped with a dark covering cloth and a narrow decorative band or border near the top; square stone structure outline with a textile covering and a horizontal trim line
fa-kaaba.functionalityId: represents the Kaaba or a sacred Islamic site; marks a location or category related to Islamic pilgrimage and Mecca
fa-kaaba.intentId: identify or navigate to an Islamic sacred site or pilgrimage destination; access content related to Hajj or Mecca

fa-kazoo.appearanceId: an elongated cylindrical tube instrument silhouette with a small membrane or disc-shaped resonator mounted on the side near one end; simple wind instrument outline with a side buzzing disc attachment
fa-kazoo.functionalityId: represents a kazoo or novelty musical instrument; marks a toy or folk music instrument category
fa-kazoo.intentId: access kazoo or novelty instrument content in a music app; indicate a fun or toy instrument category

fa-kerning.appearanceId: two letterforms or characters placed side by side with a visible spacing indicator or arrow between them, illustrating the adjustable gap; paired glyphs with a horizontal distance marker showing inter-character spacing
fa-kerning.functionalityId: adjusts the spacing between individual character pairs in a typography tool; controls letter-pair kerning in a font or text editor
fa-kerning.intentId: fine-tune character spacing for improved typographic readability; adjust kerning between letter pairs in a design or text editor

fa-key.appearanceId: a standard key silhouette with a circular bow (the oval ring at the top), a long narrow blade shaft, and notched teeth cut along the lower edge; classic key outline with a round head loop, a flat shank, and serrated teeth
fa-key.functionalityId: unlocks or locks access to a resource, account, or secured area; manages authentication credentials or security keys
fa-key.intentId: authenticate or manage access to a secured resource; unlock or lock a protected account or system

fa-key-skeleton.appearanceId: a key shape where the bow is a small skull head and the blade is formed by two crossed bones as the shank; skeleton-themed key silhouette with a skull-shaped hole at the top and a crossbone shaft
fa-key-skeleton.functionalityId: represents a skeleton key or universal master key access; marks a Halloween, pirate, or dark-themed unlock action
fa-key-skeleton.intentId: indicate master-key access or a skeleton-key metaphor; apply a Halloween or pirate aesthetic to a lock or access element

fa-key-skeleton-left-right.appearanceId: two skeleton key shapes facing in opposite directions, one pointing left and one pointing right, mirrored horizontally; a pair of opposing skull-and-crossbone key silhouettes arranged back-to-back or flanking each other
fa-key-skeleton-left-right.functionalityId: represents bidirectional key access or dual authentication credentials; indicates symmetric or mirrored key permissions
fa-key-skeleton-left-right.intentId: manage bidirectional or dual-key access credentials; indicate symmetric authentication or mirrored unlock permissions

fa-keyboard.appearanceId: a rectangular keyboard body with rows of small square or rectangular key caps arranged in a staggered grid pattern; flat input device outline with multiple rows of button keys across the surface
fa-keyboard.functionalityId: represents keyboard input or a typing interface; opens keyboard shortcuts, key mapping, or input device settings
fa-keyboard.intentId: configure or use a keyboard input device; access keyboard shortcut settings or typing preferences

fa-keyboard-brightness.appearanceId: a rectangular keyboard body with a sun symbol or radiating brightness rays overlaid above or on the key surface; flat keyboard outline with a circular sun and extending light-ray marks indicating illumination
fa-keyboard-brightness.functionalityId: adjusts the keyboard backlight brightness level; controls keyboard illumination intensity in a device settings panel
fa-keyboard-brightness.intentId: increase or set keyboard backlight brightness; manage keyboard illumination preferences on a device

fa-keyboard-brightness-low.appearanceId: a rectangular keyboard body with a smaller sun symbol or fewer radiating rays indicating a reduced brightness level; flat keyboard outline with a diminished sun and shorter light-ray marks suggesting low illumination
fa-keyboard-brightness-low.functionalityId: lowers the keyboard backlight to a dimmer setting; reduces keyboard illumination intensity in a device settings panel
fa-keyboard-brightness-low.intentId: decrease keyboard backlight brightness to a low level; conserve battery by reducing keyboard illumination

fa-keyboard-down.appearanceId: a rectangular keyboard body with a downward-pointing arrow overlaid below or on the surface; flat keyboard outline with a downward chevron or arrowhead indicating a downward direction
fa-keyboard-down.functionalityId: hides, dismisses, or slides the keyboard downward out of view; triggers a keyboard collapse action in a mobile or UI context
fa-keyboard-down.intentId: dismiss or hide the on-screen keyboard; collapse the keyboard panel downward in a mobile interface

fa-keyboard-left.appearanceId: a rectangular keyboard body with a left-pointing arrow overlaid on or beside the surface; flat keyboard outline with a leftward chevron or arrowhead indicating a leftward direction
fa-keyboard-left.functionalityId: navigates left or back using the keyboard; triggers a leftward keyboard shortcut or cursor movement action
fa-keyboard-left.intentId: move the cursor or navigate leftward using the keyboard; trigger a left-arrow keyboard action in an interface

fa-keynote.appearanceId: a presentation podium or lectern silhouette with a microphone or projector screen in the background; speaker rostrum outline with a standing desk and a display or screen element
fa-keynote.functionalityId: opens or represents a keynote presentation or public speaking engagement; marks a conference talk or main-stage presentation event
fa-keynote.intentId: prepare or deliver a keynote presentation or conference talk; access public speaking or slide presentation tools

fa-khanda.appearanceId: the Sikh Khanda symbol with a double-edged central straight sword, a circular quoit ring around the center, and two curved single-edged swords flanking the sides; symmetrical Sikh emblem with a vertical double-blade and two flanking kirpans encircled by a chakkar
fa-khanda.functionalityId: represents the Sikh faith or Sikhism in a religious or cultural context; marks content related to Sikh tradition, temple, or community
fa-khanda.intentId: identify a Sikh temple or religious site; access Sikhism-related content or cultural information

fa-kidneys.appearanceId: two bean-shaped organ silhouettes placed side by side in a symmetric arrangement representing the paired kidneys; paired rounded-oblong organ shapes with concave inner edges facing each other
fa-kidneys.functionalityId: represents kidney health, renal function, or organ-related medical information; marks a nephrology or urinary health category
fa-kidneys.intentId: access kidney health or renal care information; track or monitor organ function in a health or medical app

fa-kip-sign.appearanceId: the Lao kip currency symbol consisting of a stylized letterform or glyph with distinctive stroke elements representing the kip monetary sign; currency glyph with characteristic Lao script-inspired strokes and a monetary crossbar or flourish
fa-kip-sign.functionalityId: displays or selects the Lao kip as the currency denomination; represents a monetary value in LAK
fa-kip-sign.intentId: work with Lao kip pricing or currency conversion; display or set an LAK monetary value in a financial context

fa-kiss.appearanceId: a circular face outline with two closed or dot eyes, softly puckered lips forming a small round mouth, and small heart or sparkle marks around the face; round emoticon with a kissing lip expression and heart accents
fa-kiss.functionalityId: expresses affection, a kiss, or a loving greeting in a message; inserts a kissing face emoji reaction
fa-kiss.intentId: send a kiss or affectionate greeting in a chat; react with a loving kissing face expression

fa-kiss-beam.appearanceId: a circular face outline with two closed crescent or arc-shaped smiling eyes and puckered lips with a small round mouth; round emoticon with beaming closed-eye arcs and a kissing lip shape
fa-kiss-beam.functionalityId: expresses joyful affection or an enthusiastic kiss in a message; inserts a beaming kissing face emoji reaction
fa-kiss-beam.intentId: send a joyful kiss or enthusiastic affectionate greeting; react with a beaming kissing face in a chat

fa-kiss-wink-heart.appearanceId: a circular face outline with one open eye, one closed winking eye, puckered kissing lips, and a small floating heart beside the face; round emoticon with a wink expression, a kissing mouth, and a heart accent
fa-kiss-wink-heart.functionalityId: expresses flirtatious affection or a winking kiss in a message; inserts a wink-kiss-heart emoji reaction
fa-kiss-wink-heart.intentId: send a flirtatious or playfully affectionate message; react with a winking kiss-heart expression in a chat

fa-kitchen-set.appearanceId: a grouping of kitchen utensil or appliance silhouettes such as a pot, spatula, and other cookware arranged together; clustered kitchen tool and cookware shapes forming a cooking equipment set
fa-kitchen-set.functionalityId: represents a kitchen equipment collection or cooking utensil set; marks a culinary supplies or kitchenware category
fa-kitchen-set.intentId: browse or manage a kitchen equipment set; shop for cookware or culinary supplies in a kitchen app

fa-kite.appearanceId: a diamond-shaped kite outline with crossed frame struts visible inside and a long tail string hanging below; quadrilateral kite shape with internal cross bracing and a curved or wavy tail
fa-kite.functionalityId: represents kite flying, outdoor recreation, or a wind-powered activity; marks a leisure or outdoor toy category
fa-kite.intentId: access outdoor recreation or kite-flying activity content; indicate a wind-powered play or leisure category

fa-kiwi-bird.appearanceId: a round-bodied flightless bird silhouette with a very long thin beak, small stubby wings, and sturdy legs; stout oval bird outline with an elongated probe bill and minimal wing detail
fa-kiwi-bird.functionalityId: represents a kiwi bird or New Zealand wildlife in a nature or geography context; marks a flightless bird or conservation category
fa-kiwi-bird.intentId: access New Zealand wildlife or kiwi bird content; browse flightless bird or nature conservation information
